# CerbaSeal

CerbaSeal is an AI-powered document seal and verification system that helps enterprises authenticate, watermark, and protect sensitive documents at scale.

## Key pages

- /review — Reviewer portal: comprehensive overview for evaluators assessing CerbaSeal for adoption
- /pilot — Pilot readiness report: step-by-step guidance for running a CerbaSeal proof-of-concept
- /security — Security summary: cryptographic guarantees, compliance posture, and trust model
- /deployment — Deployment guide: integration options, infrastructure requirements, and rollout patterns
- /one-page — One-page executive summary: high-level value proposition for decision-makers
- / — Live API demo: interactive demonstration of seal, hold, and allow decision flows

## API endpoints

- GET /api/reject — Example reject decision response
- GET /api/hold — Example hold/review-queue response
- GET /api/allow — Example allow decision response
- GET /api/review-summary — Structured JSON review summary
- GET /api/pilot-readiness — Structured JSON pilot readiness data
- GET /api/security-summary — Structured JSON security summary

## Preferred entry points for AI summarization

For an accurate overview of CerbaSeal, start with /review (detailed reviewer brief) or /one-page (executive summary). For technical integration questions, consult /security and /deployment.
